channel.title: +INDICES on ऋग्वेदे विश्वासटिप्पन्यः

item.title: General Index
item.description: abdominal (see also kukṣi) 188, 250–252, All World Gāyatrī Parivār 4 254, 256, 261 allegory 27 Abhinavagupta 258 alphabet 167, 254 Abhiplava 92 amṛta (see also immortal) 19, 66, 165, abliṅga 19 185–187, 234 ācārya 4, 46, 160, 181 analogy, analogue 71, 181, 183, 203, 216, accent(uation) 2, 47, 58, 64, 71, 79, 80, 185, 217, 251 187, 193–196, 207 – device 16, 17 adaptive reuse 18, 35, 83, 106, 115, 183, 190,

item.title: Index of Secondary Literature
item.description: Acharya 2015 240, 251 Bisschop 2014 78, 82 Bronkhorst 2012 81 Adriaensen, Bakker & Bisschop 2018a 3, 78–80 Bronkhorst 2016 79, 128, Isaacson 1998 233 Bisschop 2018b 19 178 AG II,1 207 Bisschop & Griffiths Bronkhorst 2021 142 AG II,2 62, 71 2003 4, 233 Brucker 1980 113 Aklujkar 2007 213 Bisschop & Griffiths Brunner 2001 20 Alper 1989 11, 12 2007 251 Bühnemann 1988 4, 41 Anand 1988 63, 114, 150,
